title: El corsario negro
writer: Antonio Momplet, A. Ramos Pedrueza, Emilio Salgari
actors: Pedro Armendáriz, June Marlowe, María Luisa Zea
plot: This genuine swashbuckler is yet another film from prolific Director Chano Urueta. It is based on the 1868 novel "The Black Corsair" by Italian author Emilio Salgari. Set in the Caribbean Sea during the 1700's age of piracy, it ch...
